Table 3: Comparison of inference efficiency between TOOLSPEC and prior plug-and-play methods. We report the mean number of accepted tokens (#MAT), average decoding speed (tokens/s), and wall-clock speedup relative to vanilla autoregressive decoding. The best results are shown in boldface, and the second-best results are underlined. ∗The Eagle series, a training-required SD method, is included for reference only.

Figure 5: Illustration of tool-calling generation with TOOLSPEC. To accelerate structural tool calling, TOOLSPEC integrates two complementary drafting strategies: (a) Schema-aware drafting, where a finite-state machine guides highly accurate drafting within the predefined tool schema; and (b) Retrieval-augmented speculation, which reuses historical generation patterns as high-quality drafts to speed up recurrent tool calls.
